import React,{createContext,useState,useCallback}from'react';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";export const NotificationContext=/*#__PURE__*/createContext();export const NotificationProvider=_ref=>{let{children}=_ref;const[notifications,setNotifications]=useState([]);const addNotification=useCallback(function(message){let type=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:'info';let duration=arguments.length>2&&arguments[2]!==undefined?arguments[2]:5000;const id=Date.now();const notification={id,message,type// 'success', 'error', 'info', 'warning'
